event: Equestrian portrait of a British military officer
description: An equestrian portrait of a military officer in a bright red coat with gold braid, riding a brown horse with black legs. He wears a black tricorn hat and holds a drawn sword. Behind him, a column of soldiers in red coats and black hats stands in formation. In the background, a castle or fortress is visible on a green hillside under a blue sky with clouds. The horse is shown in a collected pose with one front leg raised.

_meta.title: Major General the Honourable Sir Charles Howard, CB, Colonel of the Regiment
